news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.

news.title:
Lodha Developers acquired rights to develop a luxury project in Malabar Hill for ₹106.1 crore, paying ₹37.4 crore in stamp duty.
Lodha's revenue rose 14.4% YoY to ₹4,672.5 crore in Q3 FY26, with record pre-sales of ₹5,620 crore, up 25% YoY.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers acquired rights to develop a luxury project in Malabar Hill for ₹106.1 crore, paying ₹37.4 crore in stamp duty.
Lodha's revenue rose 14.4% YoY to ₹4,672.5 crore in Q3 FY26, with record pre-sales of ₹5,620 crore, up 25% YoY.

news.title:
Lodha Developers to acquire an 80% stake in Solidrise Realty for ₹294.1 crore.
SRPL, incorporated in 2025, focuses on real estate in Pune; deal completes by Feb 16, 2026.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers to acquire an 80% stake in Solidrise Realty for ₹294.1 crore.
SRPL, incorporated in 2025, focuses on real estate in Pune; deal completes by Feb 16, 2026.

news.title:
Lodha Developers exceeded business development goals, enhancing bargaining power and balance sheet opportunities.
Net debt is expected to stay under 0.5x equity with plans for further reduction soon.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers exceeded business development goals, enhancing bargaining power and balance sheet opportunities.
Net debt is expected to stay under 0.5x equity with plans for further reduction soon.

news.title:
Lodha Developers targets INR 210B pre-sales; achieved INR 146B (70%) in 9 months.
Company expects 33% EBITDA margin and 20% pro forma ROE for the year.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers targets INR 210B pre-sales; achieved INR 146B (70%) in 9 months.
Company expects 33% EBITDA margin and 20% pro forma ROE for the year.

news.title:
Lodha Developers unveils Green DC Park Agreement to cut data center costs by 15%.
Turnkey data center prices drop to $6M/MW, below global range of $8M-$12M.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers unveils Green DC Park Agreement to cut data center costs by 15%.
Turnkey data center prices drop to $6M/MW, below global range of $8M-$12M.

news.title:
Lodha Developers Ltd reported no deviations in the utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25.
The company raised Rs 250 Cr in Nov 2025 and Rs 500 Cr in Sep 2025 via private placements.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers Ltd reported no deviations in the utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25.
The company raised Rs 250 Cr in Nov 2025 and Rs 500 Cr in Sep 2025 via private placements.

news.title:
Lodha Developers' Q3 net profit rose to ₹9.57B, missing estimates of ₹9.68B.
Q3 revenue surged 14.5% YoY to ₹46.7B from ₹40.8B, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers' Q3 net profit rose to ₹9.57B, missing estimates of ₹9.68B.
Q3 revenue surged 14.5% YoY to ₹46.7B from ₹40.8B, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
Lodha Developers' board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results.
Results cover quarter and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025; updates on lodhagroup.com.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers' board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results.
Results cover quarter and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025; updates on lodhagroup.com.

news.title:
Lodha Developers signs MoU with Maharashtra for ₹1 lakh crore investment.
Project includes 2.5 GW data centre park, creating 16,000 direct/indirect jobs.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers signs MoU with Maharashtra for ₹1 lakh crore investment.
Project includes 2.5 GW data centre park, creating 16,000 direct/indirect jobs.

news.title:
Lodha Developers acquired five land lots in Mumbai, Delhi, and Bengaluru in Q3.
The total estimated sales value of these acquisitions is ₹34,000 crore.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers acquired five land lots in Mumbai, Delhi, and Bengaluru in Q3.
The total estimated sales value of these acquisitions is ₹34,000 crore.

news.title:
Lodha Developers' Q3 pre-sales rose 25% YoY to ₹5,620 Cr.
Collections declined 17% YoY to ₹3,560 Cr during the same period.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers' Q3 pre-sales rose 25% YoY to ₹5,620 Cr.
Collections declined 17% YoY to ₹3,560 Cr during the same period.

news.title:
Macrotech Developers executed an NSE block trade for ~143,472 shares at Rs. 1124.4.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 16.1 crores.
news.summary:
Macrotech Developers executed an NSE block trade for ~143,472 shares at Rs. 1124.4.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 16.1 crores.

news.title:
Lodha Developers partners with MRG Group to build two Gurugram projects, targeting Rs 3,600 crore revenue.
This marks Lodha's entry into Delhi NCR's real estate market, focusing on premium residential and commercial developments.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers partners with MRG Group to build two Gurugram projects, targeting Rs 3,600 crore revenue.
This marks Lodha's entry into Delhi NCR's real estate market, focusing on premium residential and commercial developments.

news.title:
Macrotech Developers executed a block trade worth Rs. 62.9 crore on NSE.
The trade involved ~561,213 shares at Rs. 1,121.5 per share.
news.summary:
Macrotech Developers executed a block trade worth Rs. 62.9 crore on NSE.
The trade involved ~561,213 shares at Rs. 1,121.5 per share.

news.title:
SC allows Lodha Developers refund of 520.8 cr incl. interest.
ED loses lien rights; Lodha confirmed as bonafide resolution applicant.
news.summary:
SC allows Lodha Developers refund of 520.8 cr incl. interest.
ED loses lien rights; Lodha confirmed as bonafide resolution applicant.

news.title:
Top 28 Indian listed realty firms sold Rs 92,500 Cr in Apr-Sep FY26; Prestige Estates led with Rs 18,143.7 Cr.
DLF, Godrej Properties, Lodha, and Signature Global contributed ~70% of pre-sales; demand surged post-Covid.
news.summary:
Top 28 Indian listed realty firms sold Rs 92,500 Cr in Apr-Sep FY26; Prestige Estates led with Rs 18,143.7 Cr.
DLF, Godrej Properties, Lodha, and Signature Global contributed ~70% of pre-sales; demand surged post-Covid.

news.title: Jefferies maintains 'Buy' rating on Lodha with a target of Rs 1625.
news.summary: Jefferies maintains 'Buy' rating on Lodha with a target of Rs 1625.

news.title:
Lodha Developers schedules Analyst/Investor meet on Nov 25, 2025 at Jefferies GEMS Conference.
Presentation details are on lodhagroup.com; no sensitive info to be shared during the meet.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers schedules Analyst/Investor meet on Nov 25, 2025 at Jefferies GEMS Conference.
Presentation details are on lodhagroup.com; no sensitive info to be shared during the meet.

news.title:
Macrotech Developers Ltd. saw a block trade on NSE of ~1,237,220 shares at Rs. 1236.30.
The transaction amounted to Rs. 152.96 crores, highlighting significant trading activity.
news.summary:
